|ΔVDDx|.parameter: Variations between different VDD power pins

IVSSX - VSS|.parameter: Variations between all the different ground pins

IVDD.parameter: Total current into VDD power lines (source)

IVSS.parameter: Total current out of VSS ground lines (sink)

IIO.parameter: Output current source by any I/Os and control pin

IDD.parameter: Supply current in Run mode (120 MHz)
IDD.conditions: External clock, all peripherals enabled, ART disabled, fHCLK=120MHz

IDD_External_clock__all_peripheral.parameter: Supply current in Run mode (120 MHz)
IDD_External_clock__all_peripheral.conditions: External clock, all peripherals enabled, ART disabled, fHCLK=120MHz, TA=105C

VOL.parameter: Output low level voltage for an I/O pin
VOL.conditions: TTL port, IIO = +8 mA, 2.7 V < VDD < 3.6 V

IIO.parameter: Output current source by any I/Os and control pin

IDD.parameter: Supply current in Run mode (120 MHz)
IDD.conditions: External clock, all peripherals enabled, ART disabled, fHCLK=120MHz

IDD_External_clock__all_peripheral.parameter: Supply current in Run mode (120 MHz)
IDD_External_clock__all_peripheral.conditions: External clock, all peripherals enabled, ART disabled, fHCLK=120MHz, TA=105C

VOL.parameter: Output low level voltage for an I/O pin
VOL.conditions: TTL port, IIO = +8 mA, 2.7 V < VDD < 3.6 V

VOH.parameter: Output high level voltage for an I/O pin
VOH.conditions: TTL port, IIO = +8 mA, 2.7 V < VDD < 3.6 V, min VDD-0.4
